result.title: Roots. Mentors. Legacy. Innovation -- shaping the limitless possibilities of Dr. Marian Croak
result.description: The Art of Possible is a documentary tracing the legacy of Dr. Marian Croak, a pioneer whose career was shaped by family, colleagues, mentors, and collaborators. These formative relationships and moments drove her innovation forward, establishing Dr. Croak as the crucial link between foundational technology and the future of responsible AI. She pioneered Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP)—the technology powering every internet call today—holds over 200 patents, and invented critical applications like text-to-donate technology. Now, as VP of Responsible AI at Google, she continues to ensure that advanced research is built on ethical foundations for the benefit of humanity. Join us as we celebrate Dr. Croak.

result.title: Shaping the Limitless Possibilities of Dr. Marian Croak
result.description:
The Art of Possible is a documentary tracing the legacy of Dr. Marian Croak, a pioneer whose career was shaped by family, colleagues, mentors, and collaborators. These formative relationships and moments drove her innovation forward, establishing Dr. Croak as the crucial link between foundational technology and the future of responsible AI. She pioneered Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP)—the technology powering every internet call today—holds over 200 patents, and invented critical applications like text-to-donate technology. Now, as VP of Responsible AI at Google, she continues to ensure that advanced research is built on ethical foundations for the benefit of humanity. Join us as we celebrate Dr. Croak.

result.title: Happy International Women’s Day #GoogleDoodle
result.description: This International Women’s Day, the #GoogleDoodle spotlights the breakthroughs from women in STEM that helped shape the world we live in today. From the skies to the seas to lifesaving medical discoveries, these pioneers proved that curiosity knows no bounds.

result.title: The Era of AI Innovation | Where the Internet Lives
result.description:
This trailer previews the mini-documentary series for Season 5 of the Webby Award-winning Where the Internet Lives.  

Season 5 of the series focuses on how advances in AI and data center infrastructure bring solutions in every sector, from medicine to creativity. 

Check out the full series: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL590L5WQmH8dLLdbnJ775gPNvMeVWHLxT

Learn more about Google Data Centers here: https://datacenters.google/ 

#AI #Data #WhereTheInternetLives
